maintenance_note: Disney revises tier assignments periodically (approximately quarterly when a major attraction opens or closes). Manually update this file when you notice the Disney app shows a different tier than listed here. Compact enough that this is ~5 min of work per revision.

rules.ill_separate_product_note: ILL (Individual Lightning Lane, paid per-ride) attractions like TRON Lightcycle/Run, Cosmic Rewind, and Rise of the Resistance appear in the tier_1 lists below for reference, but ILL is a SEPARATE product. Buying ILL does NOT consume a Multi-Pass pre-book slot. A guest can hold 3 MLL pre-bookings AND however many ILLs they purchase.

tier_2: The Many Adventures of Winnie the Pooh
Under the Sea ~ Journey of the Little Mermaid

tier_1: Guardians of the Galaxy: Cosmic Rewind
tier_2: Disney and Pixar Short Film Festival

tier_1: The Twilight Zone Tower of Terror
Star Wars: Rise of the Resistance
tier_2: Beauty and the Beast Live on Stage

animal_kingdom.note: Animal Kingdom has no tier restrictions — guests can pre-book any 3 LL-eligible rides.
ll_eligible: It's Tough to be a Bug!
Finding Nemo: The Big Blue... and Beyond!
